patch.value: Telemetry queue tmp file orphan cleanup (83MB stale)

Found ~/.pm-cli/runtime/telemetry/.events.jsonl.3619086.1777633553317.505a373b.tmp (83MB, dated 2026-05-01) left behind by an interrupted drain. pruneExpiredQueueEntries does not GC orphaned tmp files. Add periodic cleanup of .events.jsonl.*.tmp older than 1 hour.
Telemetry runtime startup or pruneExpiredQueueEntries removes .events.jsonl.*.tmp orphans older than configurable threshold (default 1h); covered by unit test.
